name: Phileas Fogg
description: Student association for BUas and Avans students. Organises parties excursions and social events year-round.

name: Maximus
description: Student association founded in 2013. Motto: Labora et Victoria. Focus on social interactions and professional networking.

name: Student Association Xenia
description: International association for Hotel and Facility students. Parties events and annual gala. Home bar at Feestcafe Peddels every Wednesday.

name: S.V. t KAG
description: Relaxed student association. No obligations no initiations. Weekly meetups on Tuesdays at Cafe de Kater.

name: ESN Breda
description: Erasmus Student Network for international and exchange students. Also open to Dutch students. Cultural trips and social events.

name: BRESS Student Sports
description: 60+ sports at low prices. Also wine tastings pub quizzes and salsa evenings. Slogan: More than just sports.

name: Dudok van Heel Rowing Club
description: Rowing club originally for navy cadets now open to all Breda students.

name: Themed Entertainment Association (TEA)
description: For designers of immersive experiences. Connected to Imagineering and Leisure programmes.

name: Derde Akte
description: Theatre group for students who want to act or work behind the scenes. No experience needed.

name: CSV Ichthus Breda
description: Christian student association combining social activities and faith. Open to BUas and Avans students.

name: Sorority NYX
description: Sorority within Xenia. Named after Greek goddess of the night. Wednesday meetups at home bar.

name: Fraternity Palto
description: First international fraternity within Xenia. Promotes unity internationalism and professionalism.

name: Studententennis Breda
description: Only student tennis club in Breda. Beginners and experienced players welcome.

name: BELO Study Society
description: Study society for Built Environment and Logistics students. Company visits and networking events.

name: Otium Study Society
description: Study society for Master Leisure and Tourism students. Academic events and industry networking.

name: Pangea Study Society
description: Study society for BSc Tourism students. Academic discussions field trips and social gatherings.

name: Book Club
description: CLUBS@BUas via HUB. Regular meetups to discuss books. Open to all students.

name: Cooking Club
description: CLUBS@BUas via HUB. Cook together and explore different cuisines.

name: Games Club (Unplugged)
description: CLUBS@BUas via HUB. Board games card games and tabletop sessions.

name: Band Jam Club
description: CLUBS@BUas via HUB. For musicians of all levels who want to jam together.

name: Best of BUas Talent Show
description: Annual talent show where students showcase performances and creative acts. Ticketed.

name: BUas Open Day
description: Open day for prospective students. Course presentations campus tours and Q&A with lecturers.

name: Industry Event
description: Annual event connecting 130+ companies with students. Networking and recruitment opportunities.

name: Sustainable Tourism Mobility Forum
description: Academic conference on sustainable tourism and mobility. Researchers and industry professionals.

name: InterSib Introduction Week
description: Introduction week for new Hotel and Facility students. Meet associations and explore Breda.

name: Minor Information Evening
description: All 23+ BUas minors presented. Talk directly to minor coordinators.

name: Welcome Week (International Students)
description: Orientation for new international students. Workshops campus tours and city introduction.

name: BUas Career Day
description: Company presentations CV workshops interview training and direct recruitment opportunities.

name: BLEND Magazine Launch
description: Launch of student-produced BLEND magazine by HUB Production House.

name: Breda Carnival (Kielegat)
description: Major carnival celebration in Breda with parades costumes and festivities. Huge student tradition.

name: Studielink Enrolment (Dutch)
description: Deadline for Dutch students to enrol via Studielink for September bachelor start.

name: Application Deadline (Non-EU)
description: Application deadline for non-EU international students. Bachelor programmes starting September.

name: Application Deadline (EU)
description: Application deadline for EU international students. Bachelor programmes starting September.

name: Minor Application Osiris (Fall)
description: BUas students apply in Osiris for fall semester minors. First-come first-served. Two preferences.

name: Minor Application Osiris (Spring)
description: BUas students apply in Osiris for spring semester minors. First-come first-served.

name: External Minor (Kies op Maat)
description: External students download learning agreements Feb-May. Studielink registration until 26 June.
location: Online Kies op Maat and Studielink

name: Internship Placement (Year 3)
description: Recommended deadline for securing internship placement. Applies to all programmes.

name: Aviation Minor Video Deadline
description: Submit 1-minute video motivation for Aviation Management minor fall semester.

name: Newways Application Round 2
description: Send CV and motivation letter for Newways traineeship minor. Selection week 11-12.

name: Master Programme Application
description: Application deadline for all BUas master programmes starting September.

name: Industry Event Recruitment Fair
description: Annual fair where 130+ companies recruit BUas students for internships and jobs across all programmes.

name: Hospitality Internships
description: Hotel Management students intern at international hotels and resorts. Career centre helps with placement.

name: Game Studio Internships
description: Games students intern at studios in NL UK and Scandinavia. Programming art and design roles.

name: Data Science and AI Internships
description: ADS&AI students intern at tech companies and research labs. Example employer: Thermo Fisher.

name: Tourism and Leisure Internships
description: Tourism and Leisure students intern at DMOs event companies and consultancies worldwide.

name: Logistics and Built Environment Internships
description: Students intern at logistics firms municipalities and urban planning offices.

name: Creative Business Internships
description: Media students intern at agencies startups and production houses. Marketing content and digital roles.

name: Facility Management Internships
description: Facility students intern at service providers corporate offices and workplace management companies.

name: Newways Training Company
description: Full-year paid traineeship organising field trips events and seminars for real clients on campus.
